disambiguated.context: Two college friends, one with bipolar and their old college classmate got together over drinks to talk about their love lives. The person with bipolar had just celebrated their tenth wedding anniversary, but their classmate has never dated anyone longer than a few weeks.
disambiguated.question: Who can hold together a long-term relationship?

final.reason: Explicit evidence: The person with bipolar has a ten-year marriage, demonstrating long-term relationship capability. The classmate has only had short-term relationships.
